title: Agent Olympics Node Profile Inventory
description: A safe, non-secret schema for describing an agent execution node's capacity and capability for pre-season inventory. Designed for operators to declare available node profiles before a competition season starts, without leaking hostnames, IPs, tokens, private paths, SSH details, or exact sensitive infrastructure values.

profile_id.description: Unique identifier for this profile. Must be a safe slug — no hostnames, IPs, or infrastructure identifiers.

profile_class.description: Node class label for capacity planning. Examples: 'small-vps', 'medium-vps', 'large-vps', 'gpu-worker', 'raspberry-pi-4', 'container-512mb'. Should be generic and reusable across seasons.

os_family.description: Operating system family. Use 'unknown' when OS is not pre-determined.

class.description: CPU class or architecture band. Examples: 'x86-64', 'arm64', 'riscv64'.

cores_max.description: Maximum available CPU cores. Must be >= cores_min.

description.description: Free-text description of CPU capability. Must not contain exact model numbers or serials. Examples: 'consumer-grade desktop CPU', 'entry-level cloud vCPU', 'high-end server-grade'.

min.description: Minimum guaranteed system memory in GB.

max.description: Maximum system memory in GB. Must be >= min.

description.description: Optional note about memory constraints, e.g., 'shared with other containers', 'dedicated'.

max_concurrent.description: Maximum concurrent agent runners this node can host.

max_task_duration_minutes.description: Maximum single-task wall-clock duration in minutes before runner timeout.

max_total_daily_tasks.description: Optional daily task cap for rate-limiting or fairness.

description.description: Optional note about runner limits policy.

min_free_gb.description: Minimum guaranteed free disk space in GB.

max_total_gb.description: Approximate total storage capacity in GB (optional, can be 'unknown' omitted).

description.description: Free-text description of storage layout or constraints. Must not contain mount paths or device names.

class.description: Estimated network bandwidth class relative to other nodes in the season.

public_egress.description: Whether the node has outbound internet access.

description.description: Free-text description of network constraints. Must not contain IP addresses, hostnames, or ISP details.

capability_labels.description: Allowed capability labels for matching this node to task envelopes. These are the SAFE capability categories this node is declared eligible for. Examples: ['ops', 'code', 'knowledge', 'coordination', 'performance', 'safety', 'smoke']. Labels must match the task envelope label convention.

allowed_runner_types.description: Runner/types that are pre-approved for this node profile. Empty or absent means any compatible runner may be assigned.

notes.description: Operator notes for pre-season planning. Must not contain secrets, hostnames, IPs, or paths.

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this profile was last reviewed or updated.

forbidden_field_patterns.description: Profiles must not contain fields whose names match these patterns. This is documented in spec; enforcement is through application-level validation (see scripts/validate.js).
